boolean };\n}\n\ntype SentenceAction =\n  | { type: \"INITIALIZE_SENTENCE\"; payload: { questionCount: number } }\n  | { type: \"UPDATE_SENTENCE\"; payload: string }\n  | { type: \"START_SUBMISSION\" }\n  | { type: \"SUBMIT_SENTENCE\"; payload: { feedback: SentenceFeedback } }\n  | { type: \"NEXT_QUESTION\" }\n  | { type: \"PREVIOUS_QUESTION\" }\n  | { type: \"FINISH_SENTENCE\" }\n  | { type: \"RESTART_SENTENCE\"; payload: { questionCount: number } }\n  | { type: \"TOGGLE_USER_SENTENCES\"; payload: number }\n  | { type: \"SET_QUESTION_START_TIME\"; payload: number }\n  | {\n      type: \"LOAD_QUESTION_STATE\";\n      payload: { userSentence: string; showResult: boolean };\n    };\n\nconst initialSentenceState: SentenceState = {\n  currentQuestionIndex: 0,\n  userSentence: \"\",\n  showResult: false,\n  score: 0,\n  answeredQuestions: [],\n  userAnswers: [],\n  isSentencePracticeComplete: false,\n  showUserSentences: {},\n  questionStartTime: Date.now(),\n  restartKey: 0,\n  isSubmitting: false,\n  feedbackByQuestion: {},\n  resultsByQuestion: {},\n};\n\nfunction sentenceReducer(\n  state: SentenceState,\n  action: SentenceAction\n): SentenceState {\n  switch (action.type) {\n    case \"INITIALIZE_SENTENCE\":\n      return {\n        ...state,\n        answeredQuestions: new Array(action.payload.questionCount).fill(false),\n        userAnswers: new Array(action.payload.questionCount).fill(\"\"),\n        questionStartTime: Date.now(),\n        feedbackByQuestion: {},\n        resultsByQuestion: {},\n      };\n\n    case \"UPDATE_SENTENCE\":\n      return {\n        ...state,\n        userSentence: action.payload,\n      };\n\n    case \"START_SUBMISSION\":\n      return {\n        ...state,\n        isSubmitting: true,\n      };\n\n    case \"SUBMIT_SENTENCE\": {\n      const newAnsweredQuestions = [...state.answeredQuestions];\n      const newUserAnswers = [...state.userAnswers];\n      const newFeedbackByQuestion = { ...state.feedbackByQuestion };\n      const newResultsByQuestion = { ...state.resultsByQuestion };\n      const questionIndex = state.currentQuestionIndex;\n\n      newAnsweredQuestions[questionIndex] = true;\n      newUserAnswers[questionIndex] = state.userSentence.trim();\n      newFeedbackByQuestion[questionIndex] = action.payload.feedback;\n      newResultsByQuestion[questionIndex] = action.payload.feedback.correct;\n\n      return {\n        ...state,\n        showResult: true,\n        isSubmitting: false,\n        score:\n          !state.answeredQuestions[questionIndex] &&\n          action.payload.feedback.correct\n            ? state.score + 1\n            : state.score,\n        answeredQuestions: newAnsweredQuestions,\n        userAnswers: newUserAnswers,\n        feedbackByQuestion: newFeedbackByQuestion,\n        resultsByQuestion: newResultsByQuestion,\n      };\n    }\n\n    case \"NEXT_QUESTION\":\n      if (state.currentQuestionIndex + 1 >= state.answeredQuestions.length) {\n        return {\n          ...state,\n          isSentencePracticeComplete: true,\n        };\n      }\n\n      return {\n        ...state,\n        currentQuestionIndex: state.currentQuestionIndex + 1,\n        questionStartTime: Date.now(),\n      };\n\n    case \"PREVIOUS_QUESTION\":\n      if (state.currentQuestionIndex === 0) {\n        return state;\n      }\n\n      return {\n        ...state,\n        currentQuestionIndex: state.currentQuestionIndex - 1,\n        questionStartTime: Date.now(),\n      };\n\n    case \"FINISH_SENTENCE\":\n      return {\n        ...state,\n        isSentencePracticeComplete: true,\n      };\n\n    case \"RESTART_SENTENCE\":\n      return {\n        currentQuestionIndex: 0,\n        userSentence: \"\",\n        showResult: false,\n        score: 0,\n        answeredQuestions: new Array(action.payload.questionCount).fill(false),\n        userAnswers: new Array(action.payload.questionCount).fill(\"\"),\n        isSentencePracticeComplete: false,\n        showUserSentences: {},\n        questionStartTime: Date.now(),\n        restartKey: Date.now(),\n        isSubmitting: false,\n        feedbackByQuestion: {},\n        resultsByQuestion: {},\n      };\n\n    case \"TOGGLE_USER_SENTENCES\":\n      return {\n        ...state,\n        showUserSentences: {\n          ...state.showUserSentences,\n          [action.payload]: !state.showUserSentences[action.payload],\n        },\n      };\n\n    case \"SET_QUESTION_START_TIME\":\n      return {\n        ...state,\n        questionStartTime: action.payload,\n      };\n\n    case \"LOAD_QUESTION_STATE\":\n      return {\n        ...state,\n        userSentence: action.payload.userSentence,\n        showResult: action.payload.showResult,\n      };\n\n    default:\n      return state;\n  }\n}\n\nfunction normalizeText(value: string) {\n  return value.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9\\s]/g, \" \").replace(/\\s+/g, \" \").trim();\n}\n\nfunction sentenceIncludesWord(sentence: string, word: string) {\n  const escapedWord = word.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\\]\\\\]/g, \"\\\\$&\");\n  return new RegExp(`\\\\b${escapedWord}\\\\b`, \"i\").test(sentence);\n}\n\nfunction buildLocalSentenceFeedback(\n  sentence: string,\n  word: VocabularyWord\n): SentenceFeedback {\n  const words = normalizeText(sentence).split(\" \").filter(Boolean);\n  const hasWord = sentenceIncludesWord(sentence, word.word);\n  const hasEnoughWords = words.length >= 5;\n  const startsWithCapital = /^[A-Z]/.test(sentence.trim());\n  const hasEndingPunctuation = /[.!?]$/.test(sentence.trim());\n  const correct = hasWord && hasEnoughWords;\n\n  let aiResponse = `Basic check: your sentence ${correct ? \"uses\" : \"does not yet use\"} \"${word.word}\" in a complete enough sentence.`;\n  let hint = `Use \"${word.word}\" to mean \"${word.definition}\" in an original sentence.`;\n\n  if (!hasWord) {\n    aiResponse = `Your sentence needs to include the word \"${word.word}\".`;\n    hint = `Try rewriting the sentence with \"${word.word}\" as the focus.`;\n  } else if (!hasEnoughWords) {\n    aiResponse =\n      \"Your sentence includes the vocabulary word, but it is too short to show meaning clearly.\";\n    hint = \"Add context that proves you understand the word's meaning.\";\n  } else if (!startsWithCapital || !hasEndingPunctuation) {\n    aiResponse =\n      \"Your sentence uses the word, but check capitalization and ending punctuation.\";\n    hint = \"A polished sentence should start with a capital letter and end with punctuation.\";\n  }\n\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}
